name: jiandaoyun-mcp-plugin
description: Expose Jiandaoyun API operations as MCP tools for Codex and other agent platforms.

interface.shortDescription: Jiandaoyun API and OpenClaw northwest tools
interface.longDescription: A local MCP server that exposes Jiandaoyun APIs, OpenClaw install helpers, schema cache tools, northwest-company presets, and one-step business tools for form context, records, and todo summaries.
defaultPrompt: Find northwest-company form context and fields
Query northwest-company records by field display names
Create a northwest-company record from field display names
